Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Iwatodai northern harbor,[n]underground facility entrance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 4 25 25}I didn't know there was a place like this so close by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}The target should be around here somewhere...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 4 25 25}Who are they!? Lucia couldn't sense them at all until now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's so nice to finally meet you in person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Now then. We've been keeping an eye on your activities for some time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}From what we hear, you've undertaken a "righteous" battle to save the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Unfortunately, we've come here tonight to put an end to that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You've gained many new allies in such a short time, no doubt because this land crawls with sin.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Ah, Tartarus is towering as beautifully as always...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}Wait, why the hell would you wanna stop us!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 9 0 25 25}If Shadows and the Dark Hour disappear, we could lose our power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 9 0 25 25}And that's not somethin' we can abide by, get it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 2 25 25}Are you saying you're Persona-users too!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I implore you to think more carefully. Do you really want to lose your abilities?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Not just anyone can wield the power of a Persona. The Dark Hour is a frontier that is ours alone to explore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}And the same goes for the Tower of Demise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}That's your reason for stopping us!? Then you're the ones who need to think![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Who knows what might happen if we don't do something!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}A catastrophe brought on by the Shadows... What difference does it make, really?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Disasters will always exist. And humans will always destroy each other, regardless of what the Shadows do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Either way, no one can predict what misfortunes will befall who.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But more importantly, it's time you accepted the truth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Surely you will acknowledge the sense of fulfillment the Dark Hour has given you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}How about the rest of you? Do you also wish to return to your pathetic, ordinary lives?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 9 0 25 25}Whatever, you all got your own selfish reasons for fighting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 9 0 25 25}That so-called "justice" of yours? Ain't nothin' but an excuse.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 9 2 25 25}There's nothing righteous about any of ya. You're all just hypocrites![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 9 2 25 25}Like hell you chumps are gonna stop us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}Instead of wasting resources, I recommend we prioritize the Shadow first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Right. If we freak out, then we're just giving them what they want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 8 25 25}The Shadow's moving! I think it's noticed us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}All right, let's focus on our original goal. We can look for a way out after we've won.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}{f 4 1}, go ahead and select your team. Everyone, prepare for battle.[n]{f 1 1}
